Notes: Exercise RFC 2136 add_rr into an existing A rrset with a conflicting TTL. The update adds a second A at the same owner/type but with a different TTL than the pre-existing rrset, then queries the name to observe whether the server normalizes, rejects, or otherwise alters rrset state.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR to ttl1.campus.edu. where an A rrset already exists but the new RR uses a different TTL.

Steps.Name: ttl1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the resulting A rrset and any effect of TTL conflict handling.
